isolation.boundary: curl-driven validation on local endpoints + local DB evidence queries only

assertions.title: Dismiss is idempotent — no duplicate rows
Inngest baseline job produces fresh baselines used by view endpoints

steps.action: POST event dashboard/baselines.refresh.user to local Inngest dev server
steps.expected: Event accepted and baseline rows materialized in metric_baselines for user_test_001
steps.observed: Event API returned 200 with event id, but repeated DB polling found no metric_baselines rows

steps.action: GET /api/views/night for today and today-2 + independent 30-day mean/stddev via GET /api/health-data
steps.expected: Baselines match independent 30-day calculations and are anchored to requested date
steps.observed: On-demand baselines matched exactly and were date-anchored, but no job-produced baseline rows existed to confirm the job path

evidence.pollResult: attempts 1-6 all count=0 for today's rhr baseline row

assertions.issues: Could not verify the specific 'Inngest job produced baselines' contract because local Inngest event delivery did not materialize metric_baselines rows despite 200 trigger responses.

assertions.title: New user with no data sees empty states, not errors

steps.action: Call all 3 view endpoints as empty-data user user_empty_20260405_curlbe
steps.expected: 200 responses with empty/no-data structures and no server errors
steps.observed: Night/Recovery/Trend all returned 200 with zero data points and no error envelope

steps.action: Validate night/recovery empty object structures and trend zero-point structure
steps.expected: No populated health data payloads for empty user
steps.observed: night: series/summary/baselines empty; recovery: baselines/sparklines empty and daily metrics empty; trend: all requested metrics have raw values=[] and baseline zeros

assertions.title: User with < 14 days of data has suppressed baselines

steps.action: Construct <14-day baseline-history scenario by using referenceDate=2026-01-02 (10 prior rhr points in baseline window)
steps.expected: Insufficient-history contract should suppress baselines and delta/direction fields
steps.observed: Baseline window response confirmed exactly 10 points (2025-12-23..2026-01-01)

steps.expected: baselines {} (or explicit insufficient marker), and summary without delta/direction
steps.observed: Returned baselines.rhr plus summary.rhr with delta and direction

steps.expected: Suppressed baseline + no delta/direction fields for insufficient-history user
steps.observed: Returned baselines.rhr and daily metrics include delta/direction fields

assertions.issues: Insufficient-history behavior did not suppress baselines/deltas for a 10-point history window; API still emits computed baseline and full delta/direction fields.

frictions.description: Trend endpoint's empty-user shape is metric-scaffolded with baseline zeros instead of returning a literal empty baselines object, so contract interpretation required endpoint-specific normalization.
frictions.resolution: Validated emptiness via zero raw points and absence of populated metric data rather than strict object emptiness for trend.

blockers.description: Could not complete the Inngest-job-specific proof for VAL-CROSS-006: local Inngest accepted events (200 + id) but no metric_baselines rows materialized for user_test_001.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Triggered dashboard/baselines.refresh.user via POST http://localhost:8288/e/local and polled DB 6 times; still zero rows.

summary: Validated 4 assigned assertions via curl/local DB evidence: VAL-CROSS-005 passed, VAL-CROSS-017 passed, VAL-CROSS-018 failed, VAL-CROSS-006 blocked due missing observable Inngest baseline materialization despite successful event submission.
